game_name: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

special_mechanics.name: Slide
special_mechanics.description: Kevin McCallister can perform a slide attack move

special_mechanics.name: Flying Fist
special_mechanics.description: Kevin McCallister can perform a flying fist attack move

special_mechanics.name: Super Flying Fist
special_mechanics.description: Enhanced version of the flying fist attack move

special_mechanics.name: Necklace
special_mechanics.description: Causes walking enemies to slip off screen (references scene where Kevin uses necklace pearls to trip pursuers)

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources contain game description, release information, and gameplay mechanics, but no quantitative movement physics parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system documentation. Movement physics must be determined through empirical analysis of gameplay.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (SNES)
